name: Portable Brass Finish AM/FM Bluetooth Radio - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Listen to your favorite tunes and channels at home or on the go with the Portable AM/FM Bluetooth Radio from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This conveniently portable AM/FM radio can be used a variety of ways with its Bluetooth compatibility and telescopic antenna. Designed in an elegant gold hue, it also features a micro USB port and 3.5-millimeter jack for charging and listening. Plus, it comes with a charging cable and owner's manual to help get you started right away.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
